titles.en: Muhammad b. Abdallah b. al-Hasan b. al-Hasan al-Mujtaba al-Nafs al-Zakiyya
Muhammad b. Abdallah b. al-Hasan b. al-Hasan al-Mujtaba al-Nafs al-Zakiyya

segments: : ما من بني ولا وصي ولا ملك إلا في كتاب عندي، لا والله ما لمحمد بن عبدالله بن الحسن فيه اسم
arabic.text: : ما من بني ولا وصي ولا ملك إلا في كتاب عندي، لا والله ما لمحمد بن عبدالله بن الحسن فيه اسم

segments: 1. [1/-] Basair al-Darajat: Abdallah b. Ja’far from Muhammad b. Isa from Safwan from al-Iys [b. al-Qasim] from Abi Abdillah عليه السلام who said: there is not a prophet or a successor or a king except that he is found in a book which is with me. No by Allah! the name of Muhammad b. Abdallah b. al-Hasan is not in there.
en.ammaar-muslim.text: 1. [1/-] Basair al-Darajat: Abdallah b. Ja’far from Muhammad b. Isa from Safwan from al-Iys [b. al-Qasim] from Abi Abdillah عليه السلام who said: there is not a prophet or a successor or a king except that he is found in a book which is with me. No by Allah! the name of Muhammad b. Abdallah b. al-Hasan is not in there.

narratorChain.raw: [-/1] بصائر الدرجات: عبدالله بن جعفر، عن محمد بن عيسى، عن صفوان، عن العيص، عن أبي عبدالله عليه السلام قال
